title: The Have-Nots
overview: The thin line between happiness and disaster: Jakob cancels a business trip to New York City because he finds out his ex-girlfriend is coming to a party in Berlin on that day: 9/11/2001. His friend Hans goes to the US instead.

trailers.title: THE HAVE-NOTS Trailer
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
